construction.rule: Cut is solid; out is outline; both share one skeleton and continuous baseline

productTypography.fallback: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif
productTypography.restriction: the custom wordmark is for identity surfaces only and is not a UI text font

prohibited: retyping the wordmark with a stock font
using the wordmark as body copy
